---
title: "Maggie O'Leary"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: broadside
  image: about.jpg
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

:::{#hero-heading}


Maggie O'Leary is a English and mathematics major at Colgate University. In her free time, she enjoys reading mystery novels, playing the violin, and listening to music.

## Education

Colgate University | Hamilton, NY
 | Aug 2025 - May 2029
